meta.description: MSM Portal component library. Portal wrappers add Formik integration and theme styling on top of @moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui primitives.

1.name: Core
1.description: Atomic/molecule UI primitives reusable across any feature
1.criteria: Is this component directly importable by page developers and reusable across any feature or page?

2.name: Composite
2.criteria: Does this component compose multiple Core components into a page-level pattern (layout, table, navigation)?

3.name: Domain
3.criteria: Is this component only meaningful within a specific business domain (e.g., ad scheduling, video creative)?

4.name: Internal
4.criteria: Is this component used internally by other components and not directly imported by page developers?

meta.governance: See governance.json for audit cycles, promotion/deprecation queues

categories.name: Form Inputs (v1)
categories.description: All form components use Formik via useField(name). Must be used inside a <Formik> context.

components.name: MCFormTextInput
components.description: Text input with Formik integration. Shows error after touch.
components.shortDescription: Single-line text input with Formik binding
when_to_use: Single-line text input inside Formik forms
When field-level validation with error display is needed
Text fields with label, tooltip, and hint support
Readonly text display within a form context
do_not_use: Outside <Formik> context — use MCSingleTextInput instead
For multi-line text — use MCFormTextArea
For numeric input — use MCFormNumberInput

antiPatterns.reason: Value binding and validation will not work
This component only supports single line
This component accepts any text, not just numbers

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Markdown tooltip text shown on info icon

props.name: required
props.description: When false, shows (Optional) suffix on label

props.name: readonly
props.description: Renders as MCTextEllipsis instead of input

semantic_actions.action: User types text into the input
User leaves the field triggering validation
semantic_actions.triggers: onBlur → formik.handleBlur(name) → Yup validation → error display

semantic_actions.action: User clears the input via form reset

data_flow.input: formik.values[name] — string value from Formik context
data_flow.output: formik.handleChange — updates Formik field value; optional onChange prop callback

accessibility.role: textbox
accessibility.ariaLabel: Set via fieldLabel prop; falls back to aria-label if fieldLabel is omitted
keyboardInteraction: Tab: Focus the input
Type: Edit text value
Shift+Tab: Move focus to previous element
accessibility.screenReaderAnnouncement: Announces: {fieldLabel}, edit text. Error linked via aria-describedby — screen reader announces error inline.
notes: Error message rendered by MCFormFieldError is linked via aria-describedby automatically
readonly mode renders MCTextEllipsis which should carry aria-readonly=true
fullWidth is always set to true internally
In readonly mode: renders prefix + MCTextEllipsis (no input element)
Error state: red label + error message below input
Focus state: label turns palette.foundation.assent color
dos: Always provide fieldLabel for accessibility
Use hint prop for helper text below input
Use tooltip for additional context on info icon
donts: Don't hardcode placeholder text — use i18n
Don't use MCSingleTextInput directly in forms — use this wrapper
Don't set required=true without Yup validation schema
components.example:
import MCFormTextInput from '@msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormTextInput';

<MCFormTextInput
  name="title"
  fieldLabel="Campaign Title"
  required
  tooltip="Max 100 characters"
  hint="Used as the display name"
/>

notes: Label uses MCFormFieldLabel; sits above the input with 6px gap
Hint/error text sits below input with 6px gap
Focus state: border color changes to palette.foundation.assent
Error state: border color changes to palette.foundation.negative

categories.name: Empty State

components.name: EmptyState

when_to_use: When a list, table, or section has zero data to display

props.name: loadOptions
props.type: (params: { cursor?: string; searchText?: string; limit?: number }) => Promise<{ options: Array<{ label: string; value: ValueType }>; cursor: string; totalCount: number }>
props.description: Async function to load options with pagination

props.name: onChange
props.type: (newValues: Array<{ label: string; value: ValueType }>) => void

props.name: threshold
props.description: Scroll threshold to trigger next page load

props.name: leftFooterContent
props.description: Custom content in dropdown footer left

props.name: noOptionFoundLabel
props.description: Text when no options match search

components.example:
<MCDynamicDropdown<string>
  loadOptions={async ({ cursor, searchText, limit }) => {
    const result = await fetchOptions({ cursor, searchText, limit });
    return { options: result.items, cursor: result.nextCursor, totalCount: result.total };
  }}
  value={selectedOptions}
  onChange={setSelectedOptions}
  selectPlaceholder="Select items..."
/>
